meta.notes: v1.0.2 from CMS. rootPrefix='' but zip had apple-music-reference/ subfolder — manual flatten required (same pattern as music-beat-sync). No video input — search query only. Search returned 5 results; top pick: Bohemian Rhapsody by Queen (Greatest Hits I,II&III).

test_input.name: N/A
test_input.description: Search query: 'bohemian rhapsody queen' — no video input for this skill

task.name: apple-music-reference
task.purpose: Search Apple Music for 'bohemian rhapsody queen' and download the 30-second preview as M4A
task.expected_output: M4A audio file with 30-second preview + track metadata (name, artist, album, duration, URL)

install.notes: CMS fetch 111ms. Zip only 8KB (smallest of all benchmarks). rootPrefix='' but nested subfolder again — manual flatten needed. Subagent boot 16.4s.

asset_acquisition.notes: N/A — no asset to download before execution. Preview download is part of the execution phase.

steps.name: search_apple_music
steps.notes: iTunes Search API. Returned 5 results for 'bohemian rhapsody queen' in 438ms. All results include preview_url.

steps.name: search_and_download_preview
steps.notes: Search (re-run) + download top result preview. 30s M4A from audio-ssl.itunes.apple.com. 984317 bytes (961KB). Total 553ms including search.

execution.notes: Fastest execution of all 4 benchmarks. Pure API calls (iTunes Search + CDN download). No local compute. Search: 438ms, search+download: 553ms. No ffprobe needed.

delivery.notes: Output 961KB M4A (30s AAC preview). Upload ~70 KB/s (14s for 961KB) — slow relative to file size.
